name: Stuffed Beef Heart
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beef heart in cold water for about 1 hour.
2. Wash thoroughly and remove the muscles and arteries.
3. Make a filling using the cracker crumbs, white sauce, salt, pepper, and chestnuts.
4. Fill the beef heart with the mixture.
5. Securely fasten the opening of the heart.
6. Cover the stuffed heart with boiling water and cook for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce heat and simmer until the beef heart is tender.
8. Remove the heart from the water about half an hour before serving.
9. Sprinkle the remaining cracker crumbs, salt, and pepper over the top of the heart.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until browned.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
